query: 2D to 3D image-guided brachytherapy gynecologic cancer transition

results.title: From 3D to 2D and back again.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 39634355. 2023/01/04 00:00. this study was to reveal the differential 
effects of chemotherapeutic drugs between 2D- and 3D-cultures and to explore 
their underlying mechanisms. We evaluated differences between 2D- and 
3D-cultured breast cancer cell lines by assessing drug sensitivity, oxygen 
status and expression of Ki-67 and caspases. Three cell lines (BT-549, BT-474 
and T-47D) developed dense multicellular spheroids (MCSs) in 3D-culture, and 
showed greater resistance to paclita

results.title: Comparison of 2D- and 3D-culture models as drug-testing platforms in breast cancer.
